items.title: Update postcss to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps postcss from version 8.5.6 to 8.5.8, addressing a fix for the Processor#version. Additionally, it improves source map annotation cleaning performance, enhancing overall efficiency. These changes ensure better compatibility and performance for our frontend assets.

items.title: Updated Vue Plugin to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @vitejs/plugin-vue dependency from version 6.0.1 to 6.0.5. Key changes include the removal of Vite 8 beta support and various dependency updates, enhancing compatibility and stability. This ensures a smoother development experience and improved performance for the project.

items.title: Upgrade eslint-plugin-import to 2.32.0 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the eslint-plugin-import package from version 2.25.4 to 2.32.0, introducing several new features and fixes. Key additions include the new enforce-node-protocol-usage rule and TypeScript types, along with improvements to existing rules like order and extensions. This upgrade enhances linting capabilities and overall code quality in the project.
